user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add an additional office location, so that employees can be associated with the correct site
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Location screen; When I click Add additional location and provide name, acronym, timezone and address; Then the location is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing location, so that I can update its address, IP address or timezone
acceptance_criteria: Given a location is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated location is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view locations with their acronym, IP address, timezone and address, so that I can verify site configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given locations exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Name, Location acronym, IP Address, Timezone Id and Address

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the locations list, so that I can review all configured locations
acceptance_criteria: Given more locations exist than one page; When I use pagination or Refresh; Then the list reloads with current locations
